mapper.select:
select * from upstream_system_connection where 1 = 1
and connection_code like concat('%', #{connectionCode}, '%')
and master_warehouse_name like concat('%', #{masterWarehouseName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by display_order asc, last_authorized_time desc, create_time desc
select * from upstream_system_connection where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
select coalesce(max(display_order), 0) from upstream_system_connection
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_connection( connection_code, system_kind, master_warehouse_name, settlement_type, app_key_mask, app_secret_mask, app_key_ciphertext, app_secret_ciphertext, credential_key_id, status, credential_status, enabled_capabilities, display_order, last_authorized_time, last_sync_time, request_log_count, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{systemKind}, #{masterWarehouseName}, #{settlementType}, #{appKeyMask}, #{appSecretMask}, #{appKeyCiphertext}, #{appSecretCiphertext}, #{credentialKeyId}, #{status}, #{credentialStatus}, #{enabledCapabilities}, #{displayOrder}, #{lastAuthorizedTime}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{requestLogCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update upstream_system_connection set master_warehouse_name = #{masterWarehouseName}, settlement_type = #{settlementType}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection set app_key_mask = #{appKeyMask}, app_secret_mask = #{appSecretMask}, app_key_ciphertext = #{appKeyCiphertext}, app_secret_ciphertext = #{appSecretCiphertext}, credential_key_id = #{credentialKeyId}, credential_status = #{credentialStatus}, last_authorized_time = #{lastAuthorizedTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}
update upstream_system_connection set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}
update upstream_system_connection set display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection c set c.last_sync_time = sysdate(), c.request_log_count = (select count(1) from upstream_system_request_log l where l.connection_code = #{connectionCode}), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_request_log( connection_code, trace_id, operation, endpoint, request_time, response_time, duration_ms, request_payload_redacted, response_payload_redacted, external_error_code, external_error_message, status, create_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{traceId}, #{operation}, #{endpoint}, #{requestTime}, #{responseTime}, #{durationMs}, #{requestPayloadRedacted}, #{responsePayloadRedacted}, #{externalErrorCode}, #{externalErrorMessage}, #{status}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_request_log where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, request_log_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sync_state( connection_code, sync_type, status, sync_batch_id, last_started_time, last_finished_time, last_success_time, next_sync_time, total_count, success_count, failed_count, last_error_code, last_error_message, last_mode, rate_limit_ms, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{syncType}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{lastStartedTime}, #{lastFinishedTime}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{nextSyncTime}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failedCount}, #{lastErrorCode}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{lastMode}, #{rateLimitMs}, sysdate() ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_started_time = values(last_started_time), last_finished_time = values(last_finished_time), last_success_time = coalesce(values(last_success_time), last_success_time), next_sync_time = values(next_sync_time), total_count = values(total_count), success_count = values(success_count), failed_count = values(failed_count), last_error_code = values(last_error_code), last_error_message = values(last_error_message), last_mode = values(last_mode), rate_limit_ms = values(rate_limit_ms), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_sync_state where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by field(sync_type, 'WAREHOUSE', 'LOGISTICS_CHANNEL', 'SKU', 'SKU_DIMENSION', 'INVENTORY'), sync_type
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sync_batch( sync_batch_id, connection_code, sync_type, mode, status, pulled_count, inserted_count, changed_count, unchanged_count, disabled_count, failed_count, started_time, finished_time, error_message ) values ( #{syncBatchId}, #{connectionCode}, #{syncType}, #{mode}, #{status}, coalesce(#{pulledCount}, 0), coalesce(#{insertedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{changedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{unchangedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{disabledCount}, 0), coalesce(#{failedCount}, 0), #{startedTime}, #{finishedTime}, #{errorMessage} ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), pulled_count = values(pulled_count), inserted_count = values(inserted_count), changed_count = values(changed_count), unchanged_count = values(unchanged_count), disabled_count = values(disabled_count), failed_count = values(failed_count), finished_time = values(finished_time), error_message = values(error_message)
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sync_batch set status = #{status}, pulled_count = coalesce(#{pulledCount}, 0), inserted_count = coalesce(#{insertedCount}, 0), changed_count = coalesce(#{changedCount}, 0), unchanged_count = coalesce(#{unchangedCount}, 0), disabled_count = coalesce(#{disabledCount}, 0), failed_count = coalesce(#{failedCount}, 0), finished_time = #{finishedTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage} where sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId}
mapper.insert:
insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage( connection_code, sync_batch_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, create_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.syncBatchId}, #{item.warehouseCode}, #{item.warehouseName}, #{item.countryCode}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate() )
on duplicate key update warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), country_code = values(country_code), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), create_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, status, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) select s.connection_code, s.warehouse_code, s.warehouse_name, s.country_code, 'ACTIVE', s.source_payload_json, s.source_payload_hash, s.sync_batch_id, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s left join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code and c.warehouse_code = s.warehouse_code where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} and c.connection_code is null
mapper.update: update upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c inner join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.warehouse_name = s.warehouse_name, c.country_code = s.country_code, c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.source_payload_json = s.source_payload_json, c.source_payload_hash = s.source_payload_hash, c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate(), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') <> coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c inner join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c left join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'DISABLED', c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.warehouse_code is null and c.status <> 'DISABLED'
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, status, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{countryCode}, #{status}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), country_code = values(country_code), status = values(status), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_warehouse_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, warehouse_pairing_id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate_stage( connection_code, sync_batch_id, warehouse_code, channel_code, channel_name, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, create_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.syncBatchId}, #{item.warehouseCode}, #{item.channelCode}, #{item.channelName}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate() )
on duplicate key update channel_name = values(channel_name), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), create_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, channel_code, channel_name, status, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) select s.connection_code, s.warehouse_code, s.channel_code, s.channel_name, 'ACTIVE', s.source_payload_json, s.source_payload_hash, s.sync_batch_id, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate_stage s left join upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code and c.warehouse_code = s.warehouse_code and c.channel_code = s.channel_code where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} and c.connection_code is null
mapper.update: update upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate c inner join upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.channel_code = c.channel_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.channel_name = s.channel_name, c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.source_payload_json = s.source_payload_json, c.source_payload_hash = s.source_payload_hash, c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate(), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') <> coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate c inner join upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.channel_code = c.channel_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate c left join upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.channel_code = c.channel_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'DISABLED', c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.channel_code is null and c.status <> 'DISABLED'
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, channel_code, channel_name, status, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{warehouseCode}, #{channelCode}, #{channelName}, #{status}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update channel_name = values(channel_name), status = values(status), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_logistics_channel_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by upstream_channel_code asc, create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate_stage( connection_code, sync_batch_id, master_sku, master_product_name, product_alias_name, approve_status, product_type, product_description, image_url, main_code, other_code, fnsku, country_of_origin_name, currency_code, customhouse_code, dangerous_cargo, declare_name_cn, declare_name_en, declare_price, product_height, product_height_bs, product_length, product_length_bs, product_weight, product_weight_bs, product_width, product_width_bs, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, cat1_name, cat2_name, cat3_name, platform_sku_info_json, brazil_tax_info_json, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, search_text, create_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.syncBatchId}, #{item.masterSku}, #{item.masterProductName}, #{item.productAliasName}, #{item.approveStatus}, #{item.productType}, #{item.productDescription}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.mainCode}, #{item.otherCode}, #{item.fnsku}, #{item.countryOfOriginName}, #{item.currencyCode}, #{item.customhouseCode}, #{item.dangerousCargo}, #{item.declareNameCn}, #{item.declareNameEn}, #{item.declarePrice}, #{item.height}, #{item.heightBs}, #{item.length}, #{item.lengthBs}, #{item.weight}, #{item.weightBs}, #{item.width}, #{item.widthBs}, #{item.wmsHeight}, #{item.wmsHeightBs}, #{item.wmsLength}, #{item.wmsLengthBs}, #{item.wmsWeight}, #{item.wmsWeightBs}, #{item.wmsWidth}, #{item.wmsWidthBs}, #{item.cat1Name}, #{item.cat2Name}, #{item.cat3Name}, #{item.platformSkuInfoJson}, #{item.brazilTaxInfoJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, #{item.searchText}, sysdate() )
on duplicate key update master_product_name = values(master_product_name), product_alias_name = values(product_alias_name), approve_status = values(approve_status), product_type = values(product_type), product_description = values(product_description), image_url = values(image_url), main_code = values(main_code), other_code = values(other_code), fnsku = values(fnsku), country_of_origin_name = values(country_of_origin_name), currency_code = values(currency_code), customhouse_code = values(customhouse_code), dangerous_cargo = values(dangerous_cargo), declare_name_cn = values(declare_name_cn), declare_name_en = values(declare_name_en), declare_price = values(declare_price), product_height = values(product_height), product_height_bs = values(product_height_bs), product_length = values(product_length), product_length_bs = values(product_length_bs), product_weight = values(product_weight), product_weight_bs = values(product_weight_bs), product_width = values(product_width), product_width_bs = values(product_width_bs), wms_height = values(wms_height), wms_height_bs = values(wms_height_bs), wms_length = values(wms_length), wms_length_bs = values(wms_length_bs), wms_weight = values(wms_weight), wms_weight_bs = values(wms_weight_bs), wms_width = values(wms_width), wms_width_bs = values(wms_width_bs), cat1_name = values(cat1_name), cat2_name = values(cat2_name), cat3_name = values(cat3_name), platform_sku_info_json = values(platform_sku_info_json), brazil_tax_info_json = values(brazil_tax_info_json), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), search_text = values(search_text), create_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, product_alias_name, approve_status, product_type, product_description, image_url, main_code, other_code, fnsku, country_of_origin_name, currency_code, customhouse_code, dangerous_cargo, declare_name_cn, declare_name_en, declare_price, product_height, product_height_bs, product_length, product_length_bs, product_weight, product_weight_bs, product_width, product_width_bs, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, cat1_name, cat2_name, cat3_name, platform_sku_info_json, brazil_tax_info_json, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) select s.connection_code, s.master_sku, s.master_product_name, s.product_alias_name, s.approve_status, s.product_type, s.product_description, s.image_url, s.main_code, s.other_code, s.fnsku, s.country_of_origin_name, s.currency_code, s.customhouse_code, s.dangerous_cargo, s.declare_name_cn, s.declare_name_en, s.declare_price, s.product_height, s.product_height_bs, s.product_length, s.product_length_bs, s.product_weight, s.product_weight_bs, s.product_width, s.product_width_bs, s.wms_height, s.wms_height_bs, s.wms_length, s.wms_length_bs, s.wms_weight, s.wms_weight_bs, s.wms_width, s.wms_width_bs, s.cat1_name, s.cat2_name, s.cat3_name, s.platform_sku_info_json, s.brazil_tax_info_json, s.source_payload_json, s.source_payload_hash, 'ACTIVE', s.search_text, s.sync_batch_id, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from upstream_system_sku_candidate_stage s left join upstream_system_sku_candidate c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code and c.master_sku = s.master_sku where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} and c.connection_code is null
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_sku_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.master_product_name = s.master_product_name, c.product_alias_name = s.product_alias_name, c.approve_status = s.approve_status, c.product_type = s.product_type, c.product_description = s.product_description, c.image_url = s.image_url, c.main_code = s.main_code, c.other_code = s.other_code, c.fnsku = s.fnsku, c.country_of_origin_name = s.country_of_origin_name, c.currency_code = s.currency_code, c.customhouse_code = s.customhouse_code, c.dangerous_cargo = s.dangerous_cargo, c.declare_name_cn = s.declare_name_cn, c.declare_name_en = s.declare_name_en, c.declare_price = s.declare_price, c.product_height = s.product_height, c.product_height_bs = s.product_height_bs, c.product_length = s.product_length, c.product_length_bs = s.product_length_bs, c.product_weight = s.product_weight, c.product_weight_bs = s.product_weight_bs, c.product_width = s.product_width, c.product_width_bs = s.product_width_bs, c.wms_height = coalesce(s.wms_height, c.wms_height), c.wms_height_bs = coalesce(s.wms_height_bs, c.wms_height_bs), c.wms_length = coalesce(s.wms_length, c.wms_length), c.wms_length_bs = coalesce(s.wms_length_bs, c.wms_length_bs), c.wms_weight = coalesce(s.wms_weight, c.wms_weight), c.wms_weight_bs = coalesce(s.wms_weight_bs, c.wms_weight_bs), c.wms_width = coalesce(s.wms_width, c.wms_width), c.wms_width_bs = coalesce(s.wms_width_bs, c.wms_width_bs), c.cat1_name = s.cat1_name, c.cat2_name = s.cat2_name, c.cat3_name = s.cat3_name, c.platform_sku_info_json = s.platform_sku_info_json, c.brazil_tax_info_json = s.brazil_tax_info_json, c.source_payload_json = s.source_payload_json, c.source_payload_hash = s.source_payload_hash, c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.search_text = s.search_text, c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate(), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') <> coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_sku_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_sku_candidate c left join upstream_system_sku_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'DISABLED', c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.master_sku is null and c.status <> 'DISABLED'
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, product_alias_name, approve_status, product_type, product_description, image_url, main_code, other_code, fnsku, country_of_origin_name, currency_code, customhouse_code, dangerous_cargo, declare_name_cn, declare_name_en, declare_price, product_height, product_height_bs, product_length, product_length_bs, product_weight, product_weight_bs, product_width, product_width_bs, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, cat1_name, cat2_name, cat3_name, platform_sku_info_json, brazil_tax_info_json, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{masterSku}, #{masterProductName}, #{productAliasName}, #{approveStatus}, #{productType}, #{productDescription}, #{imageUrl}, #{mainCode}, #{otherCode}, #{fnsku}, #{countryOfOriginName}, #{currencyCode}, #{customhouseCode}, #{dangerousCargo}, #{declareNameCn}, #{declareNameEn}, #{declarePrice}, #{height}, #{heightBs}, #{length}, #{lengthBs}, #{weight}, #{weightBs}, #{width}, #{widthBs}, #{wmsHeight}, #{wmsHeightBs}, #{wmsLength}, #{wmsLengthBs}, #{wmsWeight}, #{wmsWeightBs}, #{wmsWidth}, #{wmsWidthBs}, #{cat1Name}, #{cat2Name}, #{cat3Name}, #{platformSkuInfoJson}, #{brazilTaxInfoJson}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, #{status}, #{searchText}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update master_product_name = values(master_product_name), product_alias_name = values(product_alias_name), approve_status = values(approve_status), product_type = values(product_type), product_description = values(product_description), image_url = values(image_url), main_code = values(main_code), other_code = values(other_code), fnsku = values(fnsku), country_of_origin_name = values(country_of_origin_name), currency_code = values(currency_code), customhouse_code = values(customhouse_code), dangerous_cargo = values(dangerous_cargo), declare_name_cn = values(declare_name_cn), declare_name_en = values(declare_name_en), declare_price = values(declare_price), product_height = values(product_height), product_height_bs = values(product_height_bs), product_length = values(product_length), product_length_bs = values(product_length_bs), product_weight = values(product_weight), product_weight_bs = values(product_weight_bs), product_width = values(product_width), product_width_bs = values(product_width_bs), wms_height = coalesce(values(wms_height), wms_height), wms_height_bs = coalesce(values(wms_height_bs), wms_height_bs), wms_length = coalesce(values(wms_length), wms_length), wms_length_bs = coalesce(values(wms_length_bs), wms_length_bs), wms_weight = coalesce(values(wms_weight), wms_weight), wms_weight_bs = coalesce(values(wms_weight_bs), wms_weight_bs), wms_width = coalesce(values(wms_width), wms_width), wms_width_bs = coalesce(values(wms_width_bs), wms_width_bs), cat1_name = values(cat1_name), cat2_name = values(cat2_name), cat3_name = values(cat3_name), platform_sku_info_json = values(platform_sku_info_json), brazil_tax_info_json = values(brazil_tax_info_json), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), status = values(status), search_text = values(search_text), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, product_alias_name, approve_status, product_type, product_description, image_url, main_code, other_code, fnsku, country_of_origin_name, currency_code, customhouse_code, dangerous_cargo, declare_name_cn, declare_name_en, declare_price, product_height, product_height_bs, product_length, product_length_bs, product_weight, product_weight_bs, product_width, product_width_bs, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, cat1_name, cat2_name, cat3_name, platform_sku_info_json, brazil_tax_info_json, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.masterSku}, #{item.masterProductName}, #{item.productAliasName}, #{item.approveStatus}, #{item.productType}, #{item.productDescription}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.mainCode}, #{item.otherCode}, #{item.fnsku}, #{item.countryOfOriginName}, #{item.currencyCode}, #{item.customhouseCode}, #{item.dangerousCargo}, #{item.declareNameCn}, #{item.declareNameEn}, #{item.declarePrice}, #{item.height}, #{item.heightBs}, #{item.length}, #{item.lengthBs}, #{item.weight}, #{item.weightBs}, #{item.width}, #{item.widthBs}, #{item.wmsHeight}, #{item.wmsHeightBs}, #{item.wmsLength}, #{item.wmsLengthBs}, #{item.wmsWeight}, #{item.wmsWeightBs}, #{item.wmsWidth}, #{item.wmsWidthBs}, #{item.cat1Name}, #{item.cat2Name}, #{item.cat3Name}, #{item.platformSkuInfoJson}, #{item.brazilTaxInfoJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, #{item.status}, #{item.searchText}, #{item.syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() )
on duplicate key update master_product_name = values(master_product_name), product_alias_name = values(product_alias_name), approve_status = values(approve_status), product_type = values(product_type), product_description = values(product_description), image_url = values(image_url), main_code = values(main_code), other_code = values(other_code), fnsku = values(fnsku), country_of_origin_name = values(country_of_origin_name), currency_code = values(currency_code), customhouse_code = values(customhouse_code), dangerous_cargo = values(dangerous_cargo), declare_name_cn = values(declare_name_cn), declare_name_en = values(declare_name_en), declare_price = values(declare_price), product_height = values(product_height), product_height_bs = values(product_height_bs), product_length = values(product_length), product_length_bs = values(product_length_bs), product_weight = values(product_weight), product_weight_bs = values(product_weight_bs), product_width = values(product_width), product_width_bs = values(product_width_bs), wms_height = coalesce(values(wms_height), wms_height), wms_height_bs = coalesce(values(wms_height_bs), wms_height_bs), wms_length = coalesce(values(wms_length), wms_length), wms_length_bs = coalesce(values(wms_length_bs), wms_length_bs), wms_weight = coalesce(values(wms_weight), wms_weight), wms_weight_bs = coalesce(values(wms_weight_bs), wms_weight_bs), wms_width = coalesce(values(wms_width), wms_width), wms_width_bs = coalesce(values(wms_width_bs), wms_width_bs), cat1_name = values(cat1_name), cat2_name = values(cat2_name), cat3_name = values(cat3_name), platform_sku_info_json = values(platform_sku_info_json), brazil_tax_info_json = values(brazil_tax_info_json), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), status = values(status), search_text = values(search_text), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage( connection_code, sync_batch_id, master_sku, master_product_name, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, create_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.syncBatchId}, #{item.masterSku}, #{item.masterProductName}, #{item.wmsHeight}, #{item.wmsHeightBs}, #{item.wmsLength}, #{item.wmsLengthBs}, #{item.wmsWeight}, #{item.wmsWeightBs}, #{item.wmsWidth}, #{item.wmsWidthBs}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate() )
on duplicate key update master_product_name = values(master_product_name), wms_height = values(wms_height), wms_height_bs = values(wms_height_bs), wms_length = values(wms_length), wms_length_bs = values(wms_length_bs), wms_weight = values(wms_weight), wms_weight_bs = values(wms_weight_bs), wms_width = values(wms_width), wms_width_bs = values(wms_width_bs), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), create_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, wms_payload_json, wms_payload_hash, source_payload_hash, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) select s.connection_code, s.master_sku, coalesce(nullif(s.master_product_name, ''), s.master_sku), s.wms_height, s.wms_height_bs, s.wms_length, s.wms_length_bs, s.wms_weight, s.wms_weight_bs, s.wms_width, s.wms_width_bs, s.source_payload_json, s.source_payload_hash, '', 'ACTIVE', concat_ws(' ', s.master_sku, s.master_product_name), s.sync_batch_id, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage s left join upstream_system_sku_candidate c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code and c.master_sku = s.master_sku where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} and c.connection_code is null
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.master_product_name = coalesce(nullif(c.master_product_name, ''), s.master_product_name), c.wms_height = s.wms_height, c.wms_height_bs = s.wms_height_bs, c.wms_length = s.wms_length, c.wms_length_bs = s.wms_length_bs, c.wms_weight = s.wms_weight, c.wms_weight_bs = s.wms_weight_bs, c.wms_width = s.wms_width, c.wms_width_bs = s.wms_width_bs, c.wms_payload_json = s.source_payload_json, c.wms_payload_hash = s.source_payload_hash, c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.last_seen_time = sysdate(), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.wms_payload_hash, '') <> coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.wms_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')
mapper.select:
select c.*, case when p.sku_pairing_id is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as pairing_status, p.sku_pairing_id, p.system_sku, p.system_sku_name, p.customer_name from upstream_system_sku_candidate c left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
and c.status = #{status}
and p.sku_pairing_id is not null
and p.sku_pairing_id is null
and c.wms_length is not null and c.wms_width is not null and c.wms_height is not null and c.wms_weight is not null
and c.wms_length is null and c.wms_width is null and c.wms_height is null and c.wms_weight is null
and ( c.wms_length is not null or c.wms_width is not null or c.wms_height is not null or c.wms_weight is not null ) and ( c.wms_length is null or c.wms_width is null or c.wms_height is null or c.wms_weight is null )
and c.master_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and c.master_product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and p.system_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and p.customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ( c.search_text like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.system_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.system_sku_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by c.update_time desc, c.master_sku asc
mapper.sql: concat( 'OFFICIAL_MASTER:', sha2( concat( 'OFFICIAL_MASTER|', char_length(trim(coalesce(c.master_sku, ''))), ':', trim(coalesce(c.master_sku, '')), '|', char_length(trim(coalesce(c.master_product_name, ''))), ':', trim(coalesce(c.master_product_name, '')) ), 256 ) )

concat_ws('|', , coalesce(cast(c.product_length as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.product_width as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.product_height as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.product_weight as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_length as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_width as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_height as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_weight as char), 'NULL') )
mapper.select:
select min(c.connection_code) as connection_code, as source_sku_group_key, as source_dimension_group_key, as source_group_key, max(case when conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS' then 'lingxing-wms' else conn.system_kind end) as system_kind, group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name order by conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' / ') as master_warehouse_name, group_concat(distinct c.connection_code order by c.connection_code separator ',') as source_connection_codes, group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name order by conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' / ') as source_warehouse_names, count(distinct c.connection_code) as warehouse_count, count(1) as source_row_count, c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, max(c.product_alias_name) as product_alias_name, max(c.approve_status) as approve_status, max(c.product_type) as product_type, max(c.product_description) as product_description, max(c.image_url) as image_url, max(c.main_code) as main_code, max(c.other_code) as other_code, max(c.fnsku) as fnsku, max(c.country_of_origin_name) as country_of_origin_name, max(c.currency_code) as currency_code, max(c.customhouse_code) as customhouse_code, max(c.dangerous_cargo) as dangerous_cargo, max(c.declare_name_cn) as declare_name_cn, max(c.declare_name_en) as declare_name_en, max(c.declare_price) as declare_price, max(c.product_height) as product_height, max(c.product_height_bs) as product_height_bs, max(c.product_length) as product_length, max(c.product_length_bs) as product_length_bs, max(c.product_weight) as product_weight, max(c.product_weight_bs) as product_weight_bs, max(c.product_width) as product_width, max(c.product_width_bs) as product_width_bs, max(c.wms_height) as wms_height, max(c.wms_height_bs) as wms_height_bs, max(c.wms_length) as wms_length, max(c.wms_length_bs) as wms_length_bs, max(c.wms_weight) as wms_weight, max(c.wms_weight_bs) as wms_weight_bs, max(c.wms_width) as wms_width, max(c.wms_width_bs) as wms_width_bs, max(c.cat1_name) as cat1_name, max(c.cat2_name) as cat2_name, max(c.cat3_name) as cat3_name, max(c.platform_sku_info_json) as platform_sku_info_json, max(c.brazil_tax_info_json) as brazil_tax_info_json, max(c.source_payload_hash) as source_payload_hash, case when count(distinct c.status) = 1 then max(c.status) else 'MIXED' end as status, max(c.search_text) as search_text, max(c.sync_batch_id) as sync_batch_id, min(c.first_seen_time) as first_seen_time, max(c.last_seen_time) as last_seen_time, max(c.update_time) as update_time, case when sum(case when p.sku_pairing_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 'UNASSIGNED' when sum(case when p.sku_pairing_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = count(1) then 'PAIRED' else 'PARTIAL' end as pairing_status, max(p.sku_pairing_id) as sku_pairing_id, group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku, '') order by p.system_sku separator ' / ') as system_sku, group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku_name, '') order by p.system_sku_name separator ' / ') as system_sku_name, group_concat(distinct nullif(p.customer_name, '') order by p.customer_name separator ' / ') as customer_name from upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_connection conn on conn.connection_code = c.connection_code left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku where 1 = 1
and 1 = 0
and (conn.system_kind = 'lingxing-wms' or conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS')
and = #{sourceSkuGroupKey} group by c.master_sku, c.master_product_name limit 1

select c.*, as source_sku_group_key, as source_dimension_group_key, as source_group_key, case when conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS' then 'lingxing-wms' else conn.system_kind end as system_kind, conn.master_warehouse_name, c.connection_code as source_connection_codes, conn.master_warehouse_name as source_warehouse_names, 1 as warehouse_count, 1 as source_row_count, case when p.sku_pairing_id is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as pairing_status, p.sku_pairing_id, p.system_sku, p.system_sku_name, p.customer_name from upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_connection conn on conn.connection_code = c.connection_code left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku where 1 = 1
and 1 = 0
and (conn.system_kind = 'lingxing-wms' or conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS')
and = #{sourceSkuGroupKey} order by conn.master_warehouse_name asc, c.connection_code asc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_inventory_snapshot( connection_code, upstream_warehouse_code, upstream_warehouse_name, master_sku, master_product_name, inventory_scope, inventory_attribute, batch_no, location_code, total_quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, in_transit_quantity, boxed_quantity, unboxed_quantity, system_warehouse_code, system_warehouse_name, system_sku, system_sku_name, customer_name, status, sync_batch_id, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{upstreamWarehouseCode}, #{upstreamWarehouseName}, #{masterSku}, #{masterProductName}, #{inventoryScope}, #{inventoryAttribute}, #{batchNo}, #{locationCode}, #{totalQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{lockedQuantity}, #{inTransitQuantity}, #{boxedQuantity}, #{unboxedQuantity}, #{systemWarehouseCode}, #{systemWarehouseName}, #{systemSku}, #{systemSkuName}, #{customerName}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update upstream_warehouse_name = values(upstream_warehouse_name), master_product_name = values(master_product_name), total_quantity = values(total_quantity), available_quantity = values(available_quantity), locked_quantity = values(locked_quantity), in_transit_quantity = values(in_transit_quantity), boxed_quantity = values(boxed_quantity), unboxed_quantity = values(unboxed_quantity), system_warehouse_code = values(system_warehouse_code), system_warehouse_name = values(system_warehouse_name), system_sku = values(system_sku), system_sku_name = values(system_sku_name), customer_name = values(customer_name), status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_inventory_sync_state( connection_code, status, sync_batch_id, last_started_time, last_finished_time, last_success_time, next_sync_time, total_count, active_count, missing_count, last_error_message, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{lastStartedTime}, #{lastFinishedTime}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{nextSyncTime}, coalesce(#{totalCount}, 0), coalesce(#{activeCount}, 0), coalesce(#{missingCount}, 0), coalesce(#{lastErrorMessage}, ''), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_started_time = values(last_started_time), last_finished_time = values(last_finished_time), last_success_time = values(last_success_time), next_sync_time = values(next_sync_time), total_count = coalesce(values(total_count), total_count), active_count = coalesce(values(active_count), active_count), missing_count = coalesce(values(missing_count), missing_count), last_error_message = coalesce(values(last_error_message), ''), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_inventory_sync_state where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
select * from upstream_system_sku_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, sku_pairing_id desc
select * from upstream_system_sku_pairing where sku_pairing_id = #{skuPairingId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_sync_state( connection_code, status, sync_batch_id, last_started_time, last_finished_time, last_success_time, last_error_message, next_sync_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{lastStartedTime}, #{lastFinishedTime}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{nextSyncTime}, sysdate() ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_started_time = values(last_started_time), last_finished_time = values(last_finished_time), last_success_time = values(last_success_time), last_error_message = values(last_error_message), next_sync_time = values(next_sync_time), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_sku_sync_state where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
